summary: Verified 3 decimal precision implementation for silver weight values. All tests passed. Backend API returns rounded values with max 3 decimals. Frontend displays weights with exactly 3 decimal places in CurrentStock, PhysicalVsBook, Analytics pages.
critical_code_review_comments: 3 decimal precision implemented correctly in both backend (round(value, 3)) and frontend (.toFixed(3))
All weight values (gr_wt, net_wt, fine, labor) are rounded consistently
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data (343 opening stock items + 36 transactions = 344 current stock items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 decimal precision for weight values verified. CurrentStock shows 9344.688 kg gross and 7771.983 kg net. All table cells display with exactly 3 decimal places.

backend_api./api/inventory/current: Returns gr_wt, net_wt, fine, labor with max 3 decimals ✓
